Sprawling bramble of berries on the SE corner of the park. Growing right along the path. Ripening now in early April.

Park is open to the public from sun up to sun down. Access: Public.

In front yard of 1321 E. Canterbury Ct.  Pecans are great for roasting with sugar, making brittle, or baking into pecan pie. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-September.
Old pecan tree off the Trinity Strand Trail, good production but smaller nuts. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

Tree in front yard of private property but many pecans fall on the sidewalk and in the street. Ask before picking up from the lawn or driveway. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
